scripts.test:backend:unit: uv run --project backend pytest -c backend/pyproject.toml -m unit
scripts.test:backend:api: uv run --project backend pytest -c backend/pyproject.toml -m api
scripts.test:backend:integration: uv run --project backend pytest -c backend/pyproject.toml -m integration
scripts.test:editor:gate: pnpm run test:editor:check && pnpm run test:editor
scripts.test:runtime:gate: pnpm --dir runtime check && pnpm --dir runtime test && pnpm --dir runtime build
scripts.test:e2e:prepare: pnpm run test:reset:data && pnpm run test:seed:smoke && node ./scripts/testing/ensure-services.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run test:e2e:prepare && pnpm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:editor:gate && pnpm run test:runtime:gate && pnpm run test:contracts && pnpm run test:e2e
